title: pittosporum kweichowense
intro: Pittosporum kweichowense is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae, native to China, and is also known as Chinese daphne or Kweichow daphne. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of pittosporin and other compounds. Pittosporum kweichowense is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to help alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
